features.description: Add company-scoped Product Autopilot onboarding plus versioned Product Program authoring, settings persistence, and reload-safe revision history for each project.
preconditions: Paperclip project and company entities exist
Plugin state or entities can persist company-scoped settings and documents
expectedBehavior: Enables autopilot for a selected company/project pair
Persists repo/workspace/automation/budget settings and shows them again after reload
Creates and edits Product Program revisions without overwriting history
Preserves prior revisions and denies cross-company access
verificationSteps: Run targeted onboarding and Product Program tests for persistence, revisions, and cross-company denial
Manual: enable autopilot from the project surface and reload the page
Manual: edit the Product Program, create a new revision, and confirm revision history remains visible
Manual: confirm another company context cannot access the same project's onboarding or Product Program state

features.description: Implement research cycles, evidence-backed findings, scored idea generation, duplicate suppression, maybe-pool handling, swipe decisions, and preference-model updates for Product Autopilot projects.
preconditions: Autopilot onboarding and Product Program storage exist
Plugin jobs or routines can trigger research and idea generation
expectedBehavior: Runs research on demand and stores attributable reports/findings
Generates scored ideas with rationale and source references
Suppresses or annotates duplicate ideas across active and maybe-pooled ideas
Supports Pass, Maybe, Yes, and Now review actions
Updates the preference profile and idea ordering from swipe history
verificationSteps: Run research, idea-generation, and swipe-flow tests including duplicate-detection and preference-update cases
Manual: trigger research and inspect the resulting report in the browser
Manual: review generated ideas, exercise Pass/Maybe/Yes/Now, and verify downstream state changes
Manual: verify Maybe ideas surface through the intended resurfacing path without duplicate cards

features.description: Implement planning artifacts, automation-tier enforcement, isolated delivery runs with leased workspaces/ports, project and company budget caps, and pause/resume controls for approved work.
preconditions: Approved ideas can create downstream work
Workspace leasing and cost tracking primitives are available
expectedBehavior: Approved ideas produce planning artifacts with scope, dependencies, tests, and execution mode
Supervised, Semi-Auto, and Full Auto tiers enforce distinct approval/merge behavior
Delivery runs allocate isolated workspaces/worktrees and leased ports with visible metadata
Project and company-level caps pause future work with a visible reason
Operators can pause/resume either autopilot or a specific run without losing state
verificationSteps: Run delivery-run tests for planning, automation tiers, workspace leasing, budget pause behavior, and pause/resume state
Manual: create runs under each automation tier and inspect the resulting approval/merge state
Manual: verify workspace path, branch, and port metadata from the run UI
Manual: exceed a budget cap and confirm new work pauses with a visible reason

features.description: Implement convoy decomposition, dependency-aware task execution, checkpoint/resume, merge coordination, product locks, and operator intervention controls for complex delivery runs.
preconditions: Delivery runs and planning artifacts already exist
Run state can persist checkpoints and dependency metadata
expectedBehavior: Complex ideas decompose into convoy tasks with explicit dependency order
Downstream tasks stay blocked until prerequisites pass
Checkpoint and resume restore the saved run state instead of restarting
Conflicting merges or run completions are blocked with a visible reason
Operators can add notes, request checkpoints, nudge runs, and inspect linked issue/comment context during active execution
verificationSteps: Run convoy orchestration tests for dependency blocking, checkpoint/resume, locks, and merge-coordination behavior
Manual: inspect the convoy graph before and after prerequisite completion
Manual: resume a checkpointed run and verify prior workspace metadata remains attached
Manual: attempt conflicting run completion or merge behavior and confirm it is blocked visibly

features.description: Implement learner summaries, reusable knowledge and skill reinjection, recurring digests and alerts, release-health monitoring, and rollback/revert handling after merged runs.
preconditions: Delivery runs can complete and record outcomes
Post-merge or release-health checks can be modeled in plugin state/jobs
expectedBehavior: Completed runs produce learner summaries and project-scoped reusable knowledge
Relevant learned procedures can be surfaced for future runs
Recurring or triggered digests exist for opportunities, budget alerts, and stuck-run escalation
Release-health failures surface alerts and trigger the configured rollback or revert path
verificationSteps: Run tests for learner-summary persistence, digest generation, and release-health failure handling
Manual: inspect knowledge surfaces after a completed run
Manual: trigger or inspect digests from the company/project surfaces
Manual: verify a release-health failure produces visible rollback or revert handling

features.description: Wire the complete autopilot loop into Paperclip project and company navigation so operators can move through research, review, execution, knowledge, and recovery surfaces without leaving the project context.
preconditions: Core autopilot subflows and UI surfaces already exist
Project and company navigation surfaces can deep-link into plugin views
expectedBehavior: Users can reach autopilot surfaces from existing Paperclip project navigation
Users can move through research, swipe review, delivery work, knowledge, and recovery views from the same project context
Company boundaries remain enforced throughout navigation and direct API access
verificationSteps: Run browser end-to-end navigation checks across the full autopilot flow
Manual: start from the project page and traverse research, swipe, run, knowledge, and release-health surfaces
Manual: confirm the entire flow stays anchored to the current company and project context
